ab: miwari yu an uninan?
ch: M:你今天有空嘛？
en: Are you available today?

ab: makuda amaw?
ch: W:怎麼了？
en: What is the matter?

ab: maranger ku muka kirepanauwa kanu.
ch: M:我想去拜訪你。
en: I would like to visit you.

ab: ullaya ku bangabangan aw uniyan ku i ruma an uninan. mayaa ta driya dra druma dra wari i!
ch: W:我今天有事不在家，改天吧！
en: I am out today. How about another day?

ab: kaullallaya nu wari an daman? an paelipas dra karealliyan i, kaykuya mayaa kanu.
ch: M:那你明天有空嗎？我下午去找你。
en: Then, are you available tomorrow? I’ll visit you tomorrow afternoon.

ab: aiwa. ti ngarayaw yu i ruma.
ch: W:可以，我在家等你。
en: Sure, I will wait for you at home.

ab: kiyumalla ku driya, karuwa ku lu-in? maranger ku temilill benilin.
ch: M:請問我可以錄音嗎？我想做紀錄。
en: Would you mind if  I do the voice recording? I would like to keep a record.

ab: aiwa i! inaba kemadru!
ch: W:好啊！沒有問題。
en: Sure! No problem.

ab: karuwa ku lu-ing?
ch: M:可以錄影嗎？
en: Would you mind if I do the video recording?

ab: adri ku bulay. aw adri niriwak i kubaw. aeman a!
ch: W:我不好看，倉庫也沒整理，不要啦！
en: No, I am plain and the warehouse hasn’t been tidied up yet.

ab: ane kemadru i, semiyasiyasing ku lla.
ch: M:那我拍照就好。
en: Then I will just take photos.

ab: adri siyasing.
ch: W:拍照也不要。
en: No photographing either.

ab: karuwa ku lla kiyumall kanu. semangalan!
ch: M:謝謝你讓我訪問！
en: Thank you for accepting the interview.

ab: aiwa. kiyaumall yu dra manay?
ch: W:沒問題，你想問什麼？
en: You are welcome. What would you like to know?

ab: kiyumala ku driya. a llallak yu driya i, kiyakarun yu dra manay?
ch: M:請問您年輕時是做什麼的？
en: What do you do when you are young?

ab: asuwa driya i, a kinsas ku. meretra ku lla garam.
ch: W:我以前是警察，但我現在退休了。
en: I was a police officer but I am retired now.

ab: mikiyakarunan yu driya garem?
ch: M:那你現在有工作嗎？
en: Then, are you working at the moment?

ab: kiyakarun ku i takesian.
ch: W:我在學校上班。
en: I am working at school.

ab: kaadru i drekall nu wallak?
ch: M:請問您的孩子也住在部落嗎？
en: Do your kids live in the tribe too?

ab: adri, kaadru i tukay ku wallak.
ch: W:不，我的孩子在都市居住。
en: No, my kids are all living in the city.

ab: misasa yu kikadru garem?
ch: M:那你自己一個人住嗎？
en: Then, do you live by yourself?

ab: benaaw ku dra suwan dra saya. aw dra ayam dra saya. nanku trau i sabak nadru.
ch: W:我還有養一隻狗和一隻鳥，他們也是我的家人。
en: I also keep a dog and a bird. They are my family.

ab: kuyku driya. benaaw ku dra ngiyaw dra saya. ullaya ta kiyarepaillangan a garamgaman i, adri ta lla sallengseng.
ch: M:我也有養一隻貓，有動物陪伴不會無聊。
en: I have a cat too. I won’t get bored with the company of my pet.

ab: maranger ku kiyumall kanu dratu llegiyan dra paallupan.
ch: M:我想請問你關於打獵的禁忌。
en: I would like to ask you about the taboos of hunting.

ab: adri sadru ku kinalladraman. ti tubangaw yu kananku kinasaiguwan i!
ch: W:我知道的不多，但我能回答的都會回答你。
en: I don’t know much about that, but I will tell you everything I know.

ab: nanemu sinadaday dra paallupan i, ullaya tu llegiyan?
ch: M:你們打獵的武器有什麼禁忌嗎？
en: Do you have any taboos about hunting weapons?

ab: naniyam sinadaday dra paallupan i, adri karuwa semegiw a babayan.
ch: W:我們打獵的武器不可以讓女生碰到。
en: Our hunting weapons are untouchable to women.

ab: karuwa kurenang muka paallupa a babayan?
ch: M:那女人可以一起去打獵嗎？
en: Then, can women go hunting together?

ab: adri! adri karuwa muka paallupa a babayan.
ch: W:不行！女人也不可以打獵。
en: No, women cannot go hunting either.
